title: Open Redirect - redirect() with user-controlled URL
description: Passing a user-controlled URL directly to redirect() allows attackers to redirect victims to malicious external sites, enabling phishing attacks.
message: redirect() called with a variable URL - open redirect risk if URL comes from user input (CWE-601).

noncompliant.description: User-supplied URL passed directly to redirect() - attacker can redirect to any external site.

compliant.description: Validate URL is a relative path before redirecting.
